arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the API Gateway API key.

created_date.description: The date and time when the API key was created.

customer_id.description: The identifier of the customer associated with the API key.

description.description: A brief description of the API key.

enabled.description: Indicates whether the API key is enabled (true) or disabled (false).

last_updated_date.description: The date and time when the API key was last updated.

name.description: The name of the API key.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the API key.
